message:
feat(abi,harness): implement pure IO column adjustment and expand structured logging

IO ABI improvements:
- Replace _IO_adjust_column glibc delegation with pure algorithmic
  implementation: scan bytes, reset on newline/CR, tab-align to 8-col
  boundaries, increment for other bytes
- Replace _IO_adjust_wcolumn similarly for wchar_t arrays
- Both functions are now dependency-free with no glibc fallback needed

Structured logging and evidence compliance expansion:
- Add new evidence compliance checks and structured log schema fields
- Expand log schema (log_schema.json) with additional conformance entries
- Update check_structured_logs.sh validation script
- Add ~306 lines of harness instrumentation and compliance coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -78,6 +78,18 @@
       "type": "string",
       "description": "Optional parent span id"
     },
+    "decision_id": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "description": "Canonical decision identifier for cross-artifact correlation"
+    },
+    "policy_id": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "description": "Canonical policy identifier for cross-artifact correlation"
+    },
+    "evidence_seqno": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "description": "Canonical evidence sequence number for ledger/replay correlation"
+    },
     "profile": {
       "type": "string",
       "enum": ["Fast", "Full"],
@@ -165,7 +177,18 @@
             "kind": "log | snapshot | golden | diff | backtrace | report",
             "sha256": "SHA-256 hex digest for integrity verification",
             "size_bytes": "File size",
-            "description": "What this artifact contains"
+            "description": "What this artifact contains",
+            "join_keys": {
+              "type": "object",
+              "description": "Optional correlation keys tying an artifact to log/evidence rows",
+              "properties": {
+                "trace_ids": "Array of canonical trace IDs",
+                "span_ids": "Array of span IDs",
+                "decision_ids": "Array of non-zero decision IDs",
+                "policy_ids": "Array of non-zero policy IDs",
+                "evidence_seqnos": "Array of evidence sequence numbers"
+              }
+            }
           }
         }
       }

       "api_family": "malloc",
       "symbol": "realloc",

+      "policy_id": 7,
+      "evidence_seqno": 11,
       "decision": "Deny",
       "controller_id": "runtime_math_kernel.v1",
       "decision_action": "Deny",
@@ -243,14 +269,24 @@

           "sha256": "abc123...",
